site.title: Webhook Workspace
site.description: Free public webhook tester: capture HTTP requests, inspect headers and body, and try signed URLs with a secret in the path-no account required.
site.footerTagline: is a free, public webhook tester: capture requests, inspect headers and body, and try URLs with a secret in the path. No account-open the page and go.

workspace.oneWebhookRequired: At least one webhook is required
workspace.webhookUrlHint: You can copy this URL to send traffic to the webhook
workspace.noRequestsYet: No requests yet. Send traffic to the webhook URL or open
workspace.chooseWebhookLeft: Choose a webhook on the left.
workspace.selectRequestHint: Click an item in the list to inspect headers and body here.

trafficGuide.title: Test webhooks in the browser
trafficGuide.intro: Copy your webhook URL into your provider or curl. We capture the HTTP request so you can verify payloads and headers-plain path or a secret in the URL.
trafficGuide.highlight1Desc: Public slug plus a secret token in the path-works with providers that expect a signed-looking URL.
trafficGuide.highlight2Desc: Method, path, headers, and body as requests arrive. Select a row to inspect or copy JSON.
trafficGuide.highlight3Desc: Open the site and start testing. This browser session is your workspace-bookmark to return.

sendTest.serverHintBefore: The request runs from this app's server (helps with providers that block browser CORS).
sendTest.errHeadersObject: Headers must be a JSON object.
sendTest.errHeaderString: Header "{key}" must be a string value.
sendTest.errNetwork: Network error - could not reach the test endpoint.
sendTest.truncated: Response body was truncated for display.
sendTest.emptyResponse: Response status, headers, and body will show here after you send a request.

serverErrors.databaseUnavailable: Database is not available. Run with Cloudflare Workers (e.g. pnpm dev / deploy).
serverErrors.oneWebhookRequired: At least one webhook is required.
serverErrors.workspaceFull: Workspace is full ({max}). Remove one webhook to add this link.
